purpose: Probe whether the allocateBlock/capacity-style HDFS storage slot becomes thesis-grade once it is evaluated under the newer capacity-check action instead of the old blockmap-repair action.

cases.eligibility_note: Capacity-check redesign candidate. The slot used to be forced into blockmap validation even though the underlying signal is repeated NameNode allocation pressure.
